spec.goal: Implement XY-165 by standardizing Maestro self-dogfood project identity on the canonical Linear slugId and keeping retained retry recovery aligned with that canonical project when rebuilding retained lanes.
success_criteria: Checked-in self-dogfood config surfaces use the canonical Linear slugId for the pilot project.
Retained retry dispatch accepts an In Progress issue when the configured tracker project and the refreshed issue payload report the same canonical Linear slugId.
Retry dispatch still rejects issues that belong to a genuinely different project.
Recovery and operator guidance describe the same canonical project-slug requirement.
Repo-native verification passes after the recovery normalization change.
constraints: Keep config-versus-WORKFLOW contract validation strict and use exact canonical project matching for retained retry recovery.
Do not preserve historical full-slug aliases in checked-in repo config, docs, or regression tests.
Preserve rejection of unrelated projects and existing retry guard behavior.

tasks.title: Define the canonical retained-retry project identity boundary
tasks.objective: Constrain the fix to exact canonical project matching so Maestro uses the checked-in Linear slugId consistently without weakening unrelated-project rejection.
inputs: Current retry dispatch and recovery code in src/orchestrator.rs
outputs: A concrete canonical-slug rule for retained retry recovery and startup config surfaces
A clear non-goal boundary for unrelated project rejection and broader tracker identity routing
verification: The chosen rule removes reliance on historical full-slug aliases in checked-in repo content
The rule leaves config-versus-WORKFLOW equality and unrelated-project rejection intact

tasks.title: Implement canonical retry recovery routing and regression coverage
tasks.objective: Patch the retry recovery path and tests so retained workspaces recover correctly with the canonical project slug while still rejecting other projects.
inputs: Retained recovery and targeted retry tests
outputs: Runtime code that recovers retained retries through the canonical tracker project slug
Regression tests for both acceptance of the canonical project and rejection of a different project
verification: Targeted retry dry-run coverage accepts the canonical project slug
Recovered workspace selection coverage accepts the canonical project slug
Existing unrelated-project retry rejection still passes

tasks.title: Align canonical project docs and verify the recovery fix
tasks.objective: Update the operator/spec docs for the canonical project-slug rule and verify the repo stays green under the standard Maestro checks.
outputs: Docs and checked-in config examples that use the canonical project slug consistently
Verification evidence for fmt, lint, and test gates
verification: Docs use the same canonical project-slug rule as the runtime change
Run the full defaults.verification_commands set successfully

triggers: The fix requires reintroducing historical full-slug alias handling in checked-in repo content
Linear project identity proves inconsistent across more than the canonical slugId surfaces captured here
Recovery correctness depends on a broader orchestrator redesign outside retained retry matching

evidence: 2026-03-18: Retained retry recovery was skipping XY-156 while the repo still mixed historical full-slug examples with canonical Linear slugId payloads for the same pilot project.

2026-03-18: src/orchestrator.rs now resolves the configured tracker project first and matches retained retry issues against the canonical returned Linear slugId, while still rejecting unrelated projects.

2026-03-18: Regression coverage now includes retry_run_dry_run_accepts_issue_in_configured_canonical_project and run_project_once_recovers_retained_workspace_for_configured_canonical_project alongside the existing different-project rejection test.
2026-03-18: Checked-in self-dogfood config surfaces now use the canonical project slugId `1a216b6d7100`, and docs/guide/pilot.md describes the same canonical-slug requirement.
2026-03-18: Local verification passed for cargo make fmt-check, cargo make lint, and cargo make test.

context_snapshot.resolved_gap: Retained retry recovery and checked-in self-dogfood config must align on the canonical Linear slugId before matching retained issues.
